title: Theres something about Rei that I just cant stand
display_title: Theres something about Rei that I just cant stand
wikitext:
[]: There's something about Rei that I just can't stand.             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Aug 11, 2005 10:28 am Seeing as this worked very well last time, lets give it another go. :) Rei's just some kind of living emo girl doll with hardly a will of her own for most of the show. It's enough to weird a guy out you know? Her relationship with the commander is disturbing to say the least. I can't understand how she can be left for lot of time to her own devices, and dosn't take a look at the world around her, and try to live a little. Damn even Shinji makes some friends. This girl just seems content to stay in a life she hates to the point she longs to be nothing, but does nothing to change it. Shit, even the other emotioanl distrubed characers try somthing at some point more the once in most cases. Rei waits till the very last possable moment to even try, what a feak. Toping it all off the girls Kentucky crush on Shinji is just disturbing, reguardless of how you argue the gentic wise its disgusting. Rei girlfriend you've got a crush on a boy your related to thats not right.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Aug 11, 2005 11:16 am Your lack of understanding about Rei is disturbing. I can only agree on the disturbing relationship with Gendou. Not on the "does nothing to change it" part. In fact I believe she's the only character actively and consciously looking for the answers to those inherent questions about life. Although probably the method is wrong, you cannot learn much about them from books. At least she's the one asking those questions in her own forum. None of the other characters seem to do that. Who am I? Why am I here? There's this movie with Phil Murray. He dies and goes to some court in purgatorium to see if he can go to heaven or should reincarnate and try again. There's an interesting quote there when they talk about the counselors IQ, something like "if you had an IQ like that life would be hell". Somehow I think that applies to Rei too.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Aug 11, 2005 11:34 am You can lean more about life by LIVING, then by avoiding humanity and trying to read up on the subject. I don't think she once talked to someone not involved with the EVA project during the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Thu Aug 11, 2005 2:59 pm She simply developed too slowly. However, I agree with AA about Rei trying to learn about things but in the wrong manner. Also, each time she was "renewed", it seems she lost any momentum she could have gathered from the last body she was in. As for the Kentucky crush, her body is part Yui but her soul is not. If Shinji wanted to get some action with Rei knowing that it's his mom's genes, then that would be odd. Rei having a thing for Shinji does not bother me one bit. She could have been renewed in Pen Pen's body for all we know and still want some Shinji action.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Aug 11, 2005 7:47 pm Now who was lilith again? What do they call humans again lilum or somthing :roll: DNA from mother sole from the all mother nicly twisted their anno.

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Fri Aug 12, 2005 3:34 am DatDude wrote: DNA from mother sole from the all mother nicly twisted their anno.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Aug 12, 2005 10:38 pm toiletduck wrote: DatDude wrote: DNA from mother sole from the all mother nicly twisted their anno.

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Fri Aug 12, 2005 10:39 pm I aggree with AA, it's true!! She's trying to learn, too bad it's in a wrong way!! Looks like she just don't understand about life THAT much!! No comment on the love thingie, it's just too...strange! But digitalex's soul theory is pretty good!! Man, i'm learning new things everyday on this forum! Toilet duck, glad i'm not the one having problem on that!!

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Sat Aug 13, 2005 9:47 am Ill giv it a go. Theres something about Rei I can't stand. Her , her appearance and her whole personality! First off, Rei irritates the living shit out of me. Everytime I hear her speak or just see her for that matter, I wanna bitch slap her back into her clone tank! Secondly, The way she looks, that dull facial expression she has, u know, the I dont hav anyother kind of expression save for pain look. Finally, her personality. I don't like these quiet, do as I'm told, non-thrill/fun and adventurous seeking type girls, their for the sad people in life with no taste in women! A likely candadit would be the picture of that fat bloke space penis put up in one of the other threads.... Man that guy is so desperate 2 get laid by a chick, hed screw a dead clone... So now I've said it, and it is a anti-rei thread so hopefully I'm not gonna be recieving any death threats or hate mail...

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Aug 13, 2005 12:04 pm I like Rei. She's o-tay.

[]:             Quote Post by wrack » Sat Aug 13, 2005 6:55 pm Titus wrote: There's something about Rei I can't stand. Her , her appearance and her whole personality! First off, Rei irritates the living shit out of me. Everytime I hear her speak or just see her for that matter, I wanna bitch slap her! Types like her are for people with no taste in women!

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Aug 13, 2005 7:26 pm wrack wrote: Titus wrote: There's something about Rei I can't stand. Her , her appearance and her whole personality! First off, Rei irritates the living shit out of me. Everytime I hear her speak or just see her for that matter, I wanna bitch slap her! Types like her are for people with no taste in women!

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Sat Aug 13, 2005 7:36 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: wrack wrote: Titus wrote: There's something about Rei I can't stand. Her , her appearance and her whole personality! First off, Rei irritates the living shit out of me. Everytime I hear her speak or just see her for that matter, I wanna bitch slap her! Types like her are for people with no taste in women!

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Sun Aug 14, 2005 4:03 pm Ill do IT! ill DO IT! YEAH! Watch this space...

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Sun Aug 14, 2005 9:16 pm wrack wrote: Titus wrote: There's something about Rei I can't stand. Her , her appearance and her whole personality! First off, Rei irritates the living shit out of me. Everytime I hear her speak or just see her for that matter, I wanna bitch slap her! Types like her are for people with no taste in women!

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Mon Aug 15, 2005 6:13 am I think it comes down to the individual actually. No 2 people's taste is the same, except when they want the same thing, i.e Choose between Rei or Asuka... u get what I'm saying no? Your personality influences your taste @Wrack - K, good 2 know. Thank god this is a anti-rei thread tho...

[]:             Quote Post by Takumi Fujiwara » Mon Aug 15, 2005 8:39 am I'll take Asuka over Rei any day after watching End Of Evangelion many times.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Aug 15, 2005 8:44 am Takumi Fujiwara wrote: I'll take Asuka over Rei any day after watching End Of Evangelion many times.

[]:             Quote Post by Takumi Fujiwara » Mon Aug 15, 2005 8:52 am Rei actually scared me so badly after my 15th viewing, which was late last night, I screamed. :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Aug 15, 2005 9:48 am Takumi Fujiwara wrote: Rei actually scared me so badly after my 15th viewing, which was late last night, I screamed. :shock:
